mapper.sql: id, parent_id, menu_name, menu_type, path, component, query, is_frame, is_cache, status, visible, perms, icon, sort, title, alias, description, external, new_window, affix, hide_breadcrumb, hide_tab, hide_menu, hide_children, hide_search, hide_footer, hide_setting, hide_i18n, hide_fullscreen, hide_refresh, hide_help, hide_notice, hide_user_info, hide_logout, ext_data, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted, remark
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0 AND parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC

SELECT m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_type, m.path, m.component, m.query, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.status, m.visible, m.perms, m.icon, m.sort, m.title, m.alias, m.description, m.external, m.new_window, m.affix, m.hide_breadcrumb, m.hide_tab, m.hide_menu, m.hide_children, m.hide_search, m.hide_footer, m.hide_setting, m.hide_i18n, m.hide_fullscreen, m.hide_refresh, m.hide_help, m.hide_notice, m.hide_user_info, m.hide_logout FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 AND m.visible = 1 AND rm.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY m.sort ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_type, m.path, m.component, m.query, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.status, m.visible, m.perms, m.icon, m.sort, m.title, m.alias, m.description, m.external, m.new_window, m.affix, m.hide_breadcrumb, m.hide_tab, m.hide_menu, m.hide_children, m.hide_search, m.hide_footer, m.hide_setting, m.hide_i18n, m.hide_fullscreen, m.hide_refresh, m.hide_help, m.hide_notice, m.hide_user_info, m.hide_logout FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 AND m.visible = 1 AND ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY m.sort ASC

SELECT
FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND visible = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalMenus, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as enabledMenus, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as disabledMenus, SUM(CASE WHEN visible = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as visibleMenus, SUM(CASE WHEN visible = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hiddenMenus, SUM(CASE WHEN menu_type = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as directoryMenus, SUM(CASE WHEN menu_type = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as menuMenus, SUM(CASE WHEN menu_type = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as buttonMenus FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_menu SET visible = #{visible}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_menu SET sort = #{sort}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE menu_tree AS ( SELECT id, parent_id FROM sys_menu WHERE id = #{menuId} AND deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT m.id, m.parent_id FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN menu_tree mt ON m.parent_id = mt.id WHERE m.deleted = 0 ) SELECT id FROM menu_tree WHERE id != #{menuId}

WITH RECURSIVE menu_tree AS ( SELECT id, parent_id FROM sys_menu WHERE id = #{menuId} AND deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT m.id, m.parent_id FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN menu_tree mt ON m.id = mt.parent_id WHERE m.deleted = 0 ) SELECT id FROM menu_tree WHERE id != #{menuId}

SELECT
FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0 AND menu_type = #{menuType} ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
